case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATON VS. ROBERT YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 481 EDDY ST. #103, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROBERT

DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL LEASE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATON
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, ROBERT
